title: Crystals
description: Adds custom ores and enchants to Minecraft
body:
#### The Crystals

There are three types of crystals in this mod: red, green and blue.

You can find shards of each color in desert temples, dungeons and ancient cities. It takes seven shards to make a full crystal.

You can also find crystal ores deep underground, which drop crystal shards when mined.

This mod also adds new enchants, which you can unlock by putting a weapon (must be diamond, gold or iron) into a smithing table, which enchants your item.

 #### The Enchants

- Red Enchant

Increases weapon attack damage by 3

- Green Enchant

Gives poison to anything you hit (wither effect if they are an undead mob)

- Blue Enchant

Applies slowness effect to anything you hit
